_meta.purpose: Phase 4 WU-4 perf budget baseline — pinned BEFORE WU-5 bundle split so WU-5 has a regression target.

notes: Real Gemini Nano latency on hardware can exceed 1500 ms p95 cold. The mocked-summarizer test in tests/performance/sentiment-latency.perf.test.ts asserts the call-shape works under the warm budget; the hardware budget is documented in docs/perf-budget.md and verified manually before each release.
scrape latency uses happy-dom DOMParser; built extension in Chrome will be faster (V8 + native DOM).
chart render uses mocked ResponsiveContainer because happy-dom lacks ResizeObserver. The LineChart subtree is the real cost driver and is unaltered.
